title: Move sub-item via API
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I saw that recently that functionality was added to the App but there’s not such mutation on the API. 
Is there any way or work-around to move sub-items to another item via the API? 
Thanks!

posts.author: javiercaste (Javier Caste)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I saw that recently that functionality was added to the App but there’s not such mutation on the API.
Is there any way or work-around to move sub-items to another item via the API?

Thanks!
